query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "opencomputer: verifiable software worlds for computer-use agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (LLM agents performing software maintenance and improvement) and domain (automated software development) as the user's question regarding "OpenComputer" and verifiable software worlds, even though it is a proposal rather than a final empirical study. It provides the necessary canonical context for the "software improvement" aspect of the user's research on extending computer-use agents.
